brand.name: MathGenius
lang.label: Language
footer.note: Separated routes, shared UI system, and en/de localization foundation
home.title: Continue learning from one calm starting point
home.subtitle: The landing page only helps the learner begin or continue. Exams, learning, profile, and security now live on their own pages.
home.resume.title: Pick up where you left off
home.resume.text: Go straight to your next recommended topic or review your study plan without digging through one long screen.
home.next.title: Move by route, not by scroll
home.next.text: Use the main navigation for the product areas: exams, learn, study plan, profile, and security.
home.routes.title: Current product routes
home.routes.text: Each major job now has its own page instead of being mixed into the homepage.
home.route.learn: /learn for the topic library and /learn/:topicId for topic pages
exams.title: Choose the exam path before choosing the next topic
exams.subtitle: The exam choice is now separated from the landing page and from the topic content, so the learning journey starts with one clear decision.
exams.kurz.title: Kurzgymi
exams.kurz.text: Best for learners preparing for a later entrance route with faster pacing and compact exam-style practice.
exams.lang.title: Langgymi
exams.lang.text: Best for learners building a strong foundation through gradual difficulty and worked examples.
exams.lang.point3: steady route from basics to challenge tasks
learn.title: Browse topics by learning goal
learn.subtitle: The library is now its own route, separate from exams, profile, and security. Open one topic at a time and move through theory, example, practice, and challenge.
learn.featured.title: Quadratic equations
learn.featured.text: A topic page should help the learner review key ideas, see a worked example, complete practice, and finish with one challenge.
learn.card.fractions.title: Fractions and percentages
learn.card.fractions.text: Part-whole relationships, percentages, and practical word problems.
learn.card.equations.title: Equations and unknowns
learn.card.equations.text: Balancing equations, isolating x, and checking by substitution.
learn.card.geometry.title: Geometry basics
learn.card.geometry.text: Perimeter, area, shapes, and visual reasoning.
topic.title: Topic details
topic.subtitle: Each topic now lives on its own route and follows the same learning structure.
topic.error.missing: This topic could not be loaded. Please return to the topic library.
plan.title: Build a weekly plan without mixing it into the homepage
plan.subtitle: Study planning belongs on its own route. The learner chooses a goal, a level, and a weekly rhythm in one focused flow.
plan.alert: Your study plan will guide the next recommended topic once learner progress is connected.
progress.title: Show progress as a next step, not just a percentage
progress.subtitle: Progress should explain what has been completed, what comes next, and how consistent the learner has been.
progress.empty.title: No topics completed yet
progress.empty.text: Choose your first topic to begin. As soon as topics are completed, the dashboard will show useful progress and next-step guidance.
profile.title: Keep profile information separate from learning and security
profile.subtitle: The profile page holds visible account details and learner preferences. Security actions live on their own route.
profile.name: Display name
security.title: Keep email, password, and account deletion outside the learning flow
security.subtitle: Security actions belong on their own route with clear status handling: idle, loading, success, and error.
security.email.title: Change email
security.email.text: Update the email only through a verification code flow.
security.password.title: Change password
security.password.text: Use a dedicated password form with clear success and error messages.
security.delete.title: Delete account
security.delete.text: Deleting an account always needs a confirmation step and should never appear on the homepage.
auth.login.title: Log in on a dedicated page
auth.login.subtitle: The login flow should not compete with exams and learning on the same screen.
auth.signup.title: Create an account on a focused sign-up page
auth.signup.subtitle: Sign-up should stay simple and separate from security and profile management.
auth.reset.title: Reset the password in its own flow
auth.reset.subtitle: Password reset belongs on its own route with a clear sequence and status messages.
auth.name: Display name
auth.signup.link: Already have an account? Log in
auth.placeholder.name: Type your name
